error_signature: workflows resetting to an older state
title: Workflows reset to an older state after saving
symptom: After saving a workflow and returning later, it appears in an older state than expected, causing loss of recent changes.
not_this_if: Workflow is saved and remains unchanged during the same session
root_cause: This issue may occur due to improper handling of the encryption key or license settings in the self-hosted environment, leading to workflows not being saved correctly.
fix_steps: Clear the existing license in the n8n settings
Set up a new encryption key in the .env file
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Clear the license and configure a new encryption key in the .env file.
